\tzpentry{ID4743}{Text Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4743 introduces Text Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\Xi_{\\text{cym}} = \\int_{\\ManifoldL} \\rho(r,t) \\cdot \\hat{O}_{\\text{acoustic}}[\\omega, \\mathbf{k}, t] \\, d^3r \\implies \\delta \\ManifoldL \\propto \\nabla \\cdot \\mathbf{S}\n\\end{equation}
